auth.bannerBody: Read the local token from {{tokenPath}} and paste it here. You can also override it with {{tokenEnv}}.
auth.invalidBody: The current token was rejected. Read the latest token from {{tokenPath}} and try again.
auth.requiredBody: Enter the local API token to load protected runtime data.

chrome.title: Local control surface for LoongClaw
chrome.subtitle: English-first bilingual console aligned with the main LoongClaw website.
